prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等华南理工优势工科专业社会热度持续偏高（2024年均为高热推荐），对物理类考生 吸引力强；江苏省2026年高考总人数约52.1万，较2025年（约35.8万）大幅增长约45.6%，竞争显著加剧；华南理工大学位于广 东广州，在江苏为非本省招生，无本地偏好优势；该校在江苏招生占比约3.8%（2025年），属中等偏低水平，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年回暖 趋势、2026年小幅扩招（+3.8%）、江苏省考生暴增约45.6%导致竞争加剧、工科专业热度持续偏高以及负面声誉的有限抑制作用，预计2026年物理类最低位次在6362名基础上小幅 前移，预测位次约6389名，区间5889–6889名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings of South China University of Technology in Jiangsu Physics Category were approximately 6193 → 7583 → 8447 → 7276 → 6362, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing and then increasing. Rankings continuously dropped by about 2554 places from 2021 to 2023, then significantly rebounded from 2024 onward, recovering to 6362 in 2025, moving up about 2085 places from the low point in 2023, with a notable warming trend in the past two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Physics Category was 50 in 2021–2022, reduced to 48 in 2023, restored to 50 in 2024, and increased to 52 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 54, an increase of 2 (+3.8%) compared to 2025, a relatively small expansion with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 32nd (27th in 2021 → 25th in 2022 → 26th in 2023 → 30th in 2024 → 31st in 2025), with a slight decline in recent years but still firmly in the top 35 nationally, making it a top-tier engineering powerhouse. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' mainly due to campus voyeurism incidents attracting public attention (35 related incidents, 34 negative), with a Douyin popularity ranking of 87th (average), overall low popularity, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was neutral, with no obvious negative public opinion. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it achieved A+ in Light Industry Technology and Engineering, A in Chemical Engineering and Technology, A in Materials Science and Engineering, A in Environmental Science and Engineering, A in Food Science and Engineering, A- in Architecture, A- in Control Science and Engineering, A- in Mechanical Engineering, and A- in Management Science and Engineering, totaling 9 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding engineering strength highly matching the Physics Category enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other advantageous engineering majors at South China University of Technology maintain high social popularity (all were highly recommended in 2024), strongly attracting Physics Category candidates. The total number of Jiangsu Gaokao candidates in 2026 is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.6% compared to 2025 (about 358,000), sharply intensifying competition. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, and is not a local enrollment in Jiangsu, with no local preference advantage. Its enrollment proportion in Jiangsu is about 3.8% (2025), a moderately low level, with limited impact from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the warming trend of historical rankings in the past two years, the small enrollment expansion in 2026 (+3.8%), the sharp increase of about 45.6% in Jiangsu candidates leading to intensified competition, the persistently high popularity of engineering majors, and the limited suppression effect of negative reputation, the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is expected to slightly move up from 6362, with a predicted ranking of about 6389, and a range of 5889–6889.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellent Talent Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Equipment and Advanced Manufacturing)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Transportation and Digital Construction)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Life Science and Health Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Double Bachelor's Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 6389, range 5889–6889. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (5889) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (AI Top Class, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering); candidates with rankings around the middle of the range (about 6389) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors (Information Engineering, Automation, Software Engineering, Mathematics), with some Tier 1 sprint attempts; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (6889) are advised to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Engineering Experimental Class categories), while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for South China University of Technology in Jiangsu's History Category were approximately 1558 → 1585 → 2229 → 1801 → 1795, showing an overall trend of first rising, then falling, and then stabilizing. In 2023, there was a significant drop (2229), and in 2024–2025, it fell back to around 1800, stabilizing in recent years. The enrollment plan for the History Category in Jiangsu was 12 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and in 2026, the plan is 13 students, an increase of 1 student (+8.3%) compared to 2025, which is a small expansion but the first increase in recent years.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 32nd, making it a top national university that also holds strong appeal for History Category candidates. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' mainly due to public attention from a campus peeping incident. Its Douyin popularity ranks 87th (average), which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. However, the History Category has few majors (only 4), so the impact is relatively limited. The majors offered in the History Category (Economics, Law, Accounting, Business Administration) correspond to discipline evaluations where Management Science and Engineering is rated A-, Business Administration has no separate rating, and overall liberal arts strengths are less prominent than engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Economics/Finance/Accounting majors is divided and cautious, Law is recommended but highly competitive, Accounting is recommended, and Business Administration is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of Jiangsu Gaokao candidates is approximately 521,000, with an estimated 141,500 History Category candidates, a significant increase of about 45.7% compared to 2025 (about 97,000), leading to intensified competition. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, and is not a local university in Jiangsu, so it has no local preference advantage. The History Category enrollment is very small (12–13 students), so regional factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings around 1800 in recent years, the small enrollment expansion in 2026 (+8.3%), the sharp increase of about 45.7% in Jiangsu History Category candidates leading to intensified competition, and the limited impact of negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the History Category in 2026 will slightly improve from 1795, with a predicted ranking of approximately 1845, and a range of 1624–2066.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Economics (Economics, Finance)
- Accounting.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Business Administration (Business Administration, Financial Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
None currently (History Category has only 4 majors, all already classified into Tier 1 and Tier 2).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 1845, with a range of 1624–2066. The History Category has few majors (only 4). Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (1624) can aim for Economics or Accounting; those with rankings around the middle (approximately 1845) are advised to focus on Law, while also considering Economics; candidates near the upper limit of the range (2066) are advised to use Business Administration as a safety option.
